summary: M442 — Dialog & Encounter Inspector tool. Live data dump at public/assets/data/dialog-inspector.json regenerated on every release. New page at /assets/dialog-inspector.html lists every dialog (DIALOG_EVENTS, RANDOM_EVENTS, BOSS_DEATH_DIALOG), every encounter, and every map node grouped by type. Inline editor for choices, outcomes, and reward fields. Generate-Prompt button copies a paste-ready Claude Code instruction with file path, line hint, identifier, and only the dirty fields (not the full object).
